name: Impossible Green Bean Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 8 ounces fresh green beans, cut lengthwise into strips.
2. Cook 1 can (4 ounces) mushroom stems and pieces, drained.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
4. Heat beans with 1 inch of salted water (1/2 teaspoon salt per cup of water) until boiling for 5 minutes, uncovered.
5. Cover and cook until tender, 5 to 10 minutes, then drain.
6. Mix cooked beans, mushrooms, onion, garlic, and cheese in the pie plate.
7. Beat remaining ingredients with a blender on high speed or hand beater until smooth (15 seconds or 1 minute).
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted between center and edge comes out clean.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
10. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
Recipe from The Bisquick "No Time To Cook" Recipe booklet featuring Impossible Pies.
